ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "rating_numerator" INTEGER /* Rating given to the dog in the tweet */,
  "rating_denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator of the rating given to the dog in the tweet */,
  "dog_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog prediction (breed) in the dog_predictions table */,
  "dog_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog stage in the dog_stages table */,
  "dog_name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog name in the dog_names table */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_time" TEXT /* Time the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_year" INTEGER /* Year the tweet was posted */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the tweet in the tweet_sources table */,
  "expanded_urls" TEXT /* Expanded URLs linked in the tweet */,
  "jpg_url" TEXT /* URL to the image in the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet text */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the tweet text (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "has_image" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains an image */,
  "has_video" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains a video */,
  "has_gif" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains a GIF */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "tweet_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_tweet_time FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_time") REFERENCES tweet_times ("time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_dog_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_stage_id") REFERENCES dog_stages ("dog_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_tweet_year FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_year") REFERENCES tweet_dates ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_dog_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_name_id") REFERENCES dog_names ("dog_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_dog_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_prediction_id") REFERENCES dog_predictions ("dog_prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_tweet_date FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_date") REFERENCES tweet_dates ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_predictions" (
  "dog_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog prediction */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the predicted dog breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predicted dog breed */,
  "breed_group" TEXT /* Group of the predicted dog breed (e.g., sporting, herding, hound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_stages" (
  "dog_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the dog stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dog stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_names" (
  "dog_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog name */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dog */,
  "popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Popularity rank of the dog name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the user interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the tweet */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., favorite, retweet, reply) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., iPhone, Android, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, analyst, admin) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., mobile, web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the engagement is associated with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., favorites, retweets) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Count of the engagement */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Rate of the engagement (e.g., favorite rate, retweet rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the tweet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Period of the time (e.g., peak, off-peak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tweet */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the tweet was posted */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the tweet was posted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tweet was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text of the mention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mention_id")
)
